summary: P1.8-10 B3.1: decision detail preview step adds Xem trên Trang chủ return link via journey registry, matching ClarityCard href behavior; omits link when highlight anchor missing.

mappings.criterion: Detail flow renders Xem trên Trang chủ when journey link exists for workflow
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue233_decision_detail_home_link.test.tsx::renders Xem trên Trang chủ link on preview step when journey link exists (growth)

mappings.criterion: Link href matches list card for same workflow_id growth and new-seller fixtures
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue233_decision_detail_home_link.test.tsx::link href matches list card for new-seller npl fixture

mappings.criterion: Integration test detail page link href equals buildHomeHighlightLink output
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue233_decision_detail_home_link.test.tsx::links refund_spike_detection to inventory_refunds refund metric on Home

mappings.criterion: Invalid or missing journey link link omitted no broken anchor
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue233_decision_detail_home_link.test.tsx::omits Home link when journey highlight is missing
